expectation: Asset Tracking: Ignored (handled by 251994). Financial Tracking: Expense of 19 ETB. Net Balance drops.
body: You have successfully paid 19.00 ETB for 1GB Daily Data package.

expectation: Asset Tracking: Data increases by 1GB. Financial Tracking: Ignored financially to prevent double-counting.
body: Dear customer, you have successfully purchased 1GB Daily Internet package. Your remaining balance is 40.00 ETB. Valid until tomorrow.

expectation: Asset Tracking: No asset changes. Financial Tracking: Expense of 25 ETB. Net Balance drops.
body: You have transferred 25.00 ETB to 0911XXXXXX. Your new balance is 15.00 ETB.

expectation: Asset Tracking: No asset changes. Financial Tracking: Expense of 29 ETB. Net Balance drops.
body: You have successfully gifted 2GB Daily Internet package to 0911XXXXXX. 29.00 ETB has been deducted.

expectation: Asset Tracking: Data increases by 500MB. Financial Tracking: No expense or income logged.
body: Dear customer, you have received a gift of 500MB Daily Internet package from 0911XXXXXX. Valid until tomorrow.

expectation: Asset Tracking: No change. Financial Tracking: Income of 50 ETB. Net Balance increases.
body: Your account has been recharged with 50.00 ETB.

expectation: Asset Tracking: No change. Financial Tracking: Income of 10 ETB logged. Net Balance increases momentarily.
body: Dear customer, you have taken a loan of 10.00 ETB. The total amount to be repaid is 11.50 ETB.
